text.title: Agent Eval Cost Budget Policy Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-eval-cost-budget-policy is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: PR feedback takes 45 minutes; devs stop running evals locally.
Nightly eval spend doubles, no one notices.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r4 ceiling + cheap-judge fallback.

antipattern.reason: Adversarial mixed into nightly and starved.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r3: separate budget line.
